name: jdy_create_data
description: Create a single data record in a form. The 'data' parameter is a JSON object where keys are widget field names (e.g. _widget_xxx) and values are objects with a 'value' key. Returns the created record with its _id and all field values. Use is_start_workflow=true for workflow forms. Use transaction_id (UUID) when the record includes file/image attachments. Rate limit: 30/s.

data_creator.description: 指定数据提交人的username（可选）

is_start_workflow.description: 是否发起流程，仅流程表单有效（默认false）

is_start_trigger.description: 是否触发智能助手（默认false）

transaction_id.description: 含附件时必填，需与文件上传时使用的transaction_id一致（UUID格式）
